title: Earnings Call Transcript - Sarepta Therapeutics Q4 2024 Beats EPS Forecast
text:
Sarepta Therapeutics reported Q4 2024 earnings that exceeded consensus estimates on both EPS and revenue, driven by record-breaking ELEVIDYS sales. The company reported EPS of $1.9 versus estimate of $1.54, and revenue of $658.4 million versus $589.45 million estimate.

Revenue Beat Drivers: The $658.4 million revenue exceeded guidance and expectations. Full-year 2024 revenue reached $1.8 billion, up 56% year-over-year. The quarter was driven primarily by ELEVIDYS gene therapy sales of $384.2 million, up 112% sequentially.

ELEVIDYS Record Performance: Fourth-quarter ELEVIDYS sales represented the most successful gene therapy launch in history by a wide margin. Full-year ELEVIDYS sales exceeded $1 billion achieved in approximately 18 months since initial approval. Treatment penetration estimated at approximately 5% of on-label patient population.

PMO Franchise Resilience: PMO (exon-skipping) franchise delivered $254 million in Q4 revenue. Full-year PMO revenue reached $967 million, demonstrating resilience despite ELEVIDYS competition. The company added patients organically without price increases.

2025 Guidance Confidence: Management provided 2025 net product revenue guidance of $2.9-3.1 billion, representing 70% year-over-year growth. Expected to come approximately two-thirds from ELEVIDYS and one-third from PMO franchise. ELEVIDYS specifically projected to grow 160%+ year-over-year.

Financial Milestone: Company achieved sustainable profitability on both GAAP and non-GAAP bases, with positive operating cash flow generation. This positioned the company to self-fund all pipeline programs internally.
